subcodes.first_line: O My Physician! We have loved thee and made mention of thee in divers Tablets. Verily thy Lord is with His servants who have turned unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا طبیبی قد احببناک و ذکرناک فی الواح شتی ان ربک مع عباده الذین اقبلوا الیه و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suicide, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for martyrs
